title: Quit India Movement Overview
description: Comprehensive overview of the 1942 Quit India Movement led by Mahatma Gandhi.
author: National Archives of India

title: Partition of India (1947)
description: Historical analysis of the partition of British India into India and Pakistan.

title: Non-Cooperation Movement (1920)
description: Gandhi's first major non-violent resistance campaign against British colonial rule.
author: Indian National Congress Records

title: Mughal Architecture Documentary
description: Visual documentary exploring Mughal architectural achievements including the Taj Mahal and Red Fort.
author: History Channel

title: Akbar's Administrative Reforms
description: Study of the revenue, military and religious reforms introduced by Emperor Akbar.

title: First Battle of Panipat (1526)
description: Account of Babur's decisive victory over Ibrahim Lodi that established Mughal rule in India.
author: Baburnama Translation Project

title: Mauryan Empire Overview
description: Detailed overview of the Mauryan Empire under Chandragupta Maurya and Ashoka the Great.
author: Ancient History Journal

title: Indus Valley Civilisation: Seals & Scripts
description: Analysis of the undeciphered Indus script and pictographic seals found at Mohenjo-daro and Harappa.
author: Archaeological Survey of India

title: The Gupta Golden Age
description: Exploration of science, mathematics, literature and art during the Gupta period.
author: Classical India Studies

title: Rise of the Maratha Confederacy
description: Study of the rise and expansion of Maratha power in 17th–18th century India.
author: Indian Historical Review

title: The Peshwa Era (1713–1818)
description: Political and military history of the Peshwa-led Maratha Confederacy at its peak expansion.
author: Deccan History Society

title: The Constitution of India (1950)
description: Original constitutional document of India adopted on 26 January 1950.
author: Constituent Assembly of India

title: Indo-Pakistan War & Bangladesh Liberation (1971)
description: Military and diplomatic history of the 1971 war leading to the creation of Bangladesh.
author: South Asia Military History

title: The Green Revolution in India
description: How the introduction of high-yield crops transformed Indian agriculture in the 1960s–70s.
author: Indian Council of Agricultural Research

title: The Bhakti Movement
description: Devotional reform movement that swept medieval India, challenging caste and orthodoxy.
author: Indian Philosophy Journal

title: Classical Dance Forms of India
description: Overview of Bharatanatyam, Kathak, Odissi and other classical dance traditions and their historical roots.

title: Architecture of the Delhi Sultanate
description: Survey of Indo-Islamic architectural styles developed under the five dynasties of the Delhi Sultanate.

title: The Vijayanagara Empire
description: Rise and fall of the last great Hindu empire of South India, centred at Hampi.

title: Aryabhata & Indian Mathematics
description: Contributions of Aryabhata to algebra, trigonometry and astronomy in the 5th century.

title: Charaka Samhita & Ayurvedic Medicine
description: Ancient Indian medical treatise and its influence on the development of Ayurveda.
author: History of Medicine Institute
